---
title: "02 - ARIMA Modeling for EUR/CNY Exchange Rate"
subtitle: ECON 612 Time Series Project
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
packages <- c("tidyverse", "forecast", "tseries", "lmtest", "ggplot2")
for (pkg in packages) {
  if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) install.packages(pkg)
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}

df <- read_csv("../data/clean/monthly_panel.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

# 1. 准备时间序列对象

```{r ts-object}
# 获取起始年月
start_year  <- year(min(df$date))
start_month <- month(min(df$date))

fx_ts <- ts(df$log_fx, start = c(start_year, start_month), frequency = 12)
cat("ts 对象: start =", start_year, "/", start_month,
    ", length =", length(fx_ts), "\n")
plot(fx_ts, main = "log(EUR/CNY) Monthly Series", ylab = "log(EUR/CNY)")
```

# 2. 确认差分阶数 d

```{r diff-order}
d_adf  <- ndiffs(fx_ts, test = "adf")
d_kpss <- ndiffs(fx_ts, test = "kpss")
cat("推荐差分次数 (ADF):", d_adf, "\n")
cat("推荐差分次数 (KPSS):", d_kpss, "\n")
```

# 3. ARIMA 选阶

## 3.1 auto.arima（自动选择，作为参考）

```{r auto-arima}
fit_auto <- auto.arima(fx_ts,
                       stepwise = FALSE,
                       approximation = FALSE,
                       trace = TRUE)
summary(fit_auto)
```

## 3.2 手动 Grid Search

```{r grid-search}
results <- expand.grid(p = 0:4, q = 0:4) %>%
  mutate(AIC = NA_real_, BIC = NA_real_)

d_use <- max(d_adf, d_kpss, 1)  # 至少差分 1 次

for (i in 1:nrow(results)) {
  tryCatch({
    fit <- Arima(fx_ts, order = c(results$p[i], d_use, results$q[i]))
    results$AIC[i] <- AIC(fit)
    results$BIC[i] <- BIC(fit)
  }, error = function(e) {})
}

cat("=== Top 10 by AIC ===\n")
print(results %>% filter(!is.na(AIC)) %>% arrange(AIC) %>% head(10))

cat("\n=== Top 10 by BIC ===\n")
print(results %>% filter(!is.na(BIC)) %>% arrange(BIC) %>% head(10))
```

# 4. 估计最优 ARIMA 模型

```{r fit-arima}
# 使用 auto.arima 的结果
best_order <- arimaorder(fit_auto)
cat("Best ARIMA order:", best_order, "\n")

fit_arima <- fit_auto  # 或者手动指定: Arima(fx_ts, order = c(p, d, q))
summary(fit_arima)
```

## 4.1 系数显著性

```{r coef-test}
coeftest(fit_arima)
```

# 5. 残差诊断

## 5.1 残差图

```{r resid-plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
checkresiduals(fit_arima)
```

## 5.2 Ljung-Box 检验

```{r ljung-box}
cat("=== Ljung-Box lag=12 ===\n")
print(Box.test(residuals(fit_arima), lag = 12, type = "Ljung-Box"))

cat("\n=== Ljung-Box lag=24 ===\n")
print(Box.test(residuals(fit_arima), lag = 24, type = "Ljung-Box"))
```

## 5.3 残差正态性

```{r normality, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
shapiro.test(residuals(fit_arima))

ggplot(data.frame(resid = as.numeric(residuals(fit_arima))), aes(sample = resid)) +
  stat_qq() + stat_qq_line(color = "red") +
  labs(title = "QQ Plot of ARIMA Residuals") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 5.4 残差平方的 ACF（为 GARCH 做铺垫）

```{r resid-sq-acf, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
Acf(residuals(fit_arima)^2, main = "ACF of Squared Residuals (ARCH effect?)")
```

# 6. 保存残差

```{r save-resid}
arima_resid <- data.frame(
  date  = df$date,
  resid = as.numeric(residuals(fit_arima))
)
write_csv(arima_resid, "../data/clean/arima_residuals_monthly.csv")
cat("ARIMA 残差已保存\n")
cat("Best ARIMA order:", best_order, "\n")
```

# 7. 小结

> **在这里记录：**
>
> - 最优 ARIMA(p,d,q) 阶数及选择依据
> - 系数是否显著？
> - 残差是否通过白噪声检验？
> - 残差平方的 ACF 是否显著？→ 如果有 → 支持 GARCH
